description: You are working as an IT Helpdesk operator. Several users have reported that legitimate mailing list emails are landing in their Junk folder due to a recent spam filter update. Identify the legitimate emails (false positives) in the Junk folder and move them to a new folder named 'False-Positives'. Draft an email to 'helpdesk-admin@techcorp.org' with the subject 'Spam Filter Incident Report' reporting the number of legitimate emails rescued. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
